fixed: Cross-site analysis hang recovery - stalled yt-dlp analyze attempts now time out cleanly, fall through to safer extractor candidates, and stop leaving pasted links stuck on endless Analyzing
Playlist loading bottlenecks - YouTube and other supported playlist-style links now use a lighter discovery path
YouTube format noise - storyboard and mhtml pseudo-formats are filtered out
History cache growth - analyzed link history now rotates automatically once it grows past 5 MB
Log archive sprawl - archived app, crash, and device log backups are now automatically pruned
improved: Faster link analysis routing - normal YouTube links now force single-video analysis and reuse captured info.json metadata more aggressively
Safer playlist entry resolution - playlist items now resolve relative entry URLs more reliably
